-- 4 of 6 --

It’s all about the angles! In this lesson, I’ll teach youHow
to understand your audience in order to develop
different ad angles. This is important because you want
to find the right angles that appeal to the customers
that’ll spend the most money and have the highest LTV.
Prospecting Scenario:
Brand: Rural Cloth
Problem to Solve: Unclear V.I.P. customer development
leading to unestablished creative direction and asset
development, affecting overall scale and offer creation.
Plan of Action: Utilize revised existing assets and
customer/social research to identify direction of asset
and offer creation.
LESSON:
PROSPECTING: PERSONA/
ANGLE TEST
MODULE:
SCALING WITH
FACEBOOK ADS
ACTION ITEM
❏ 	If DCT isn’t for you, implement a Persona/Angle
Test.
❏ 	Analyze your V.I.P. customer through market
research.
❏ 	Repurpose/revise best performing creative.
❏ 	Develop a new angle geared toward this
audience.
TOOLS & RESOURCES
• 	5 Data-Backed Tips for Writing Great
Facebook Ads Headlines, Wordstream
• 	13 of the Best Facebook Ad Examples
that Actually Work and Why, HubSpot
